audit_items.proof_trace: add_close_mapping() in emitter.cpp is a one-line delegator with zero raw allocations; it forwards to SourceMap::add_close_mapping() (source_map.cpp:181-184) which calls std::vector<Mapping>::push_back on a RAII-managed vector member. All types in the call chain (Mapping, Position, Offset, ParserState) are plain value types with no heap allocation; the vector's memory is automatically freed by the SourceMap destructor. The property's precondition—that raw allocations exist in this function—is never satisfied.
